metadata.name: girder-user-quota
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Limits total file size stored for individual users and collections and can direct all files to a specific assetstore

functions.name: setup.prerelease_local_scheme
documentation:
Return local scheme version unless building on master in CircleCI.
This function returns the local scheme version number
(e.g. 0.0.0.dev<N>+g<HASH>) unless building on CircleCI for a
pre-release in which case it ignores the hash and produces a
PEP440 compliant pre-release version number (e.g. 0.0.0.dev<N>).

methods.name: plugin_tests.user_quota_test.QuotaTestCase._uploadFile
documentation:
Upload a random file to an item.

```
param name

name of the file.

param parent

parent document to upload the file to.

param parentType

type of parent to upload to.

param size

size of the file to upload

param error

if set, expect this error.

param partial

if set, return before uploading the data.  This returns
a kwargs for self.request so that the caller can
finish the upload later.

returns

file: the created file object
```

methods.name: plugin_tests.user_quota_test.QuotaTestCase._setPolicy
documentation:
Set the quota or assetstore policy and check that it was set.

```
param policy

dictionary of values to set.

param model

either 'user' or 'collection'.

param resource

the document for the resource to test.

param user

user to use for authorization.

param error

if set, this is a substring expected in an error message.

param results

if not specified, we expect policy to match the set
results.  Otherwise, these are the expected results.
```

methods.name: plugin_tests.user_quota_test.QuotaTestCase._setQuotaDefault
documentation:
Set the default quota for a particular model.

```
param model

either 'user' or 'collection'.

param value

the value to set.  Either None or a positive integer.

param testVal

if not __NOCHECK__, test the current value to see if it
matches this.

param error

if set, this is a substring expected in an error message.
```

methods.name: plugin_tests.user_quota_test.QuotaTestCase._testAssetstores
documentation:
Test assetstore policies for a specified resource.

```
param model

either 'user' or 'collection'.

param resource

the document for the resource to test.

param user

user to use for authorization.
```

methods.name: plugin_tests.user_quota_test.QuotaTestCase._testQuota
documentation:
Test quota policies for a specified resource.

```
param model

either 'user' or 'collection'.

param resource

the document for the resource to test.

param user

user to use for authorization.
```

methods.name: plugin_tests.user_quota_test.QuotaTestCase.testAssetstorePolicy
documentation: Test assetstore policies for a user and a collection.

methods.name: plugin_tests.user_quota_test.QuotaTestCase.testQuotaPolicy
documentation: Test quota policies for a user and a collection.

methods.name: plugin_tests.user_quota_test.QuotaTestCase.testPolicySettings
documentation: Test validation of policy settings.

methods.name: plugin_tests.user_quota_test.QuotaTestCase.testFormatSize
documentation: Test the formatSize function

functions.name: girder_user_quota.quota.ValidateSizeQuota
documentation:
Validate a quota value. This may be blank or a non-negative integer.

```
param value

The proposed value.

type value

int

returns

The validated value or None,
and a recommended error message or None.

rtype

(int or None, str or None)
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy._filter
documentation:
Filter a resource to include only the ordinary data and the quota
field.

```
param model

the type of resource (e.g., user or collection)

param resource

the resource document.

returns

filtered field of the resource with the quota data, if any.
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy._setResourceQuota
documentation:
Handle setting quota policies for any resource that supports them.

```
param model

the type of resource (e.g., user or collection)

param resource

the resource document.

param params

the query parameters.  'policy' is required and used.

returns

the updated resource document.
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy._validate_fallbackAssetstore
documentation:
Validate the fallbackAssetstore parameter.

```
param value

the proposed value.

returns

the validated value: either None or 'current' to use the
current assetstore, 'none' to disable a fallback assetstore,
or an assetstore ID.
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy._validate_fileSizeQuota
documentation:
Validate the fileSizeQuota parameter.

```
param value

the proposed value.

returns

the validated value

rtype

None or int
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy._validate_preferredAssetstore
documentation:
Validate the preferredAssetstore parameter.

```
param value

the proposed value.

returns

the validated value: either None or 'current' to use the
current assetstore or an assetstore ID.
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy._validate_useQuotaDefault
documentation:
Validate the useQuotaDefault parameter.

```
param value

the proposed value.

returns

the validated value

rtype

None or bool
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy._validatePolicy
documentation:
Validate a policy JSON object. Only a limited set of keys is
supported, and each of them has a restricted data type.

```
param policy

JSON object to validate.  This may also be a Python
dictionary as if the JSON was already decoded.

returns

a validate policy dictionary.
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy._checkAssetstore
documentation:
Check is a specified assetstore is available.

```
param assetstoreSpec

None for use current assetstore, 'none' to
disallow the assetstore, or an assetstore ID to
check if that assetstore exists and is nominally
available.

returns

None to use the current assetstore, False to indicate no
assetstore is allowed, or an assetstore document of an
allowed assetstore.
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy._getBaseResource
documentation:
Get the base resource for something pertaining to quota policies. If
the base resource has no quota policy, return (None, None).

```
param model

the initial model type.  Could be file, item, folder,
user, or collection.

param resource

the initial resource document.

returns

A pair ('model', 'resource'), where 'model' is the base model
type, either 'user' or 'collection'., and 'resource' is the
base resource document or the id of that document.
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy.getUploadAssetstore
documentation:
Handle the model.upload.assetstore event. This event passes a
dictionary consisting of a model type and resource document. If the
base document has an assetstore policy, then set an assetstore key of
this dictionary to an assetstore document that should be used or
prevent the default action if no appropriate assetstores are allowed.

```
param event

event record.
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy._getFileSizeQuota
documentation:
Get the current fileSizeQuota for a resource. This takes the default
quota into account if necessary.

```
param model

the type of resource (e.g., user or collection)

param resource

the resource document.

returns

the fileSizeQuota.  None for no quota (unlimited), otherwise
a non-negative integer.
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy._checkUploadSize
documentation:
Check if an upload will fit within a quota restriction.

```
param upload

an upload document.

returns

None if the upload is allowed, otherwise a dictionary of
information about the quota restriction.
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy.checkUploadStart
documentation:
Check if an upload will fit within a quota restriction. This is before
the upload occurs, but since multiple uploads can be started
concurrently, we also have to check when the upload is being completed.

```
param event

event record.
```

methods.name: girder_user_quota.quota.QuotaPolicy.checkUploadFinalize
documentation:
Check if an upload will fit within a quota restriction before
finalizing it. If it doesn't, discard it.

```
param event

event record.
```
